# neon_role (Resource)

Manages a Neon role. Roles can only be created and deleted; name changes require replacement.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "neon_role" "example" {
  project_id = neon_project.example.id
  branch_id  = neon_branch.example.id
  name       = "myrole"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `name` (String) The role name. Cannot exceed 63 bytes in length.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID.

### Optional

- `no_login` (Boolean) Whether the role has the NOLOGIN attribute.

### Read-Only

- `authentication_method` (String) The authentication method used for the role.
- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `protected` (Boolean) Whether the role is protected.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import neon_role.example <project_id>/<branch_id>/<role_name>
```
